name: The Arc — Sahel, 2012–2026
description: Scenario 1, the vertical slice (DESIGN.md §12). Mali's northern collapse, the intervention window, the coup cascade, the AES, the mercenary patron, and the 2026 insurgent alliance — fourteen years of the premise running live. Reality is the balance baseline: a passive run should approximately reproduce history; your job is to beat it without breaking the thing you're defending.
seat: France-analog (one event deck; US seat arrives with the lead-nation roster, DESIGN.md §16.3)
notes: Node and faction starting values are 2012 conditions, PROPOSED pending the v0.5 calibration pass. Niger's collapse is now modeled (Niamey on-map). Coups are endogenous (collapse rolls) — beat events supply the political texture the system cannot generate, never the coups themselves.
sources: CFR Global Conflict Tracker — Violent Extremism in the Sahel
ACLED tri-border and Burkina Faso data
